title: Bulk Upload of users to to boards and dashboards, instead of one by one manual process
excerpt:

posts.author: Dec (Declan Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the moment we can only add users to boards or dashboards one by one, manually which is very time consuming.

We have one board with over 150 users, so if new board or dashboard is created, we need to have same users invited in a bulk import or bulk invite. This will save so much time.

posts.author: VisionApps (VisionApps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Declan,
We’ve developed an app called VisionControl that solves this exact issue!
With VisionControl, you can add multiple users to multiple boards in one click, manage permissions easily, and save valuable time.

Check it out here: VisionControl - Marketplace – happy to help with any questions!

image1920×1080 77.1 KB

posts.author: Dec (Declan Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your reply on this.

This problem is now solved with monday.com adding groups of users which include guest accounts.
